ques: Check if there are trade-in offers for the latest model of iPhone.
answer: Yes. Apple offers trade-in deals for the latest iPhone (iPhone 17 Pro). Via Apple Trade In you get up to $195–$695 in credit toward iPhone 17, iPhone Air, or iPhone 17 Pro when you trade in an iPhone 13 or higher, and Carrier Deals at Apple offer up to $800–$1100 in credit on a new iPhone after trade-in.
